raw.message: Deine Pikmin begleiten dich, egal, wohin du gehst.

hook.summary: A diverse group of Pikmin wearing various costumes walk across a lush green field.
hook.visual_action: Multiple Pikmin with unique accessories like chef hats and acorns move around while a heart icon pops up.

scene_flow: A large group of Pikmin in different costumes walk together on a green field.
Focus shifts to a single red Pikmin consuming a glowing nectar drop.
The red Pikmin reacts with joy as a heart symbol and sparkles appear.
The leaf on the Pikmin's head transforms into a white flower.
Final screen displays the game logo and a download button in German.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers and Nintendo fans who enjoy collecting cute characters and light outdoor interaction.
